wikitext.*:
The word "birb" is a cute internet name for a bird. To start, choose an egg from six colored eggs to hatch. Your hatched birb will be the corresponding color. Eventually as your birb grows up you will be able to change your birbs colors and switch them out. [File:Body1.jpg|thumb|Starting birb colors: Grey, Orange, Blue, Purple, Pink, Green]]

Then, you name the birb that you have hatched. If you are indecisive you can always randomize the name or change it later. 

After that, you give your birb pronouns (she/her, he/him, or they/them). These can also be changed later. 

You tell your birb what their name is. (This can be changed later.)

Finally, you tell them your name. Guess what? You can change that later, too.  

And voilá, you have a Birb!

Birbs can be petted by rubbing their head, a recent update allows you to pet them on adventures too. It emits floating red hearts and a burbling sound, interspersed with a "cheep cheep" sound. Petting increases your [[Friendship]] level, which has benefits. 

Birbs accrue [[Energy]] every time you complete a self-care [[Goals|Goal]] or do an [[Activities|Activity]]. When there is enough energy, they can go on an [[Adventuring|Adventure]]. While they adventure, any goals or activities you complete will make them come back sooner. When they come back, chat with them. They will have [[Discoveries|discovered]] something new, and you can either pick a response or write your own. Their personality will grow in a certain area based on what you said: confidence, curiosity, security, resilience, compassion, and logic. 

You can buy cute [[clothing]] and [[furniture]] for your birb and its birbhouse. The in-game currency is [[Rainbow Stones]]. 

With enough Adventures, a birb will also mature, going through several [[Stages of Growth]]. This will allow access to [[The Color Studio]] to change colors of a birb's various other features. It also unlocks the [[Travel with Sass|Travel Agency]], allowing your birb to visit far away lands.
